---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea — capability, UX, integration, anything.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the problem

<!-- Describe the friction you're running into. What are you trying to
do, and what gets in the way today? -->

## What would solve it

<!-- Sketch the feature. A rough API, a UI mockup, a user flow, or just
a description. Don't feel obligated to design it perfectly — the
problem description matters more than a polished solution. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about (and why they fall short). -->

## Who else would benefit

<!-- Is this a personal paper cut, or something you think most users
would hit? Be honest — niche asks are fine, we just want to size
the ROI. -->

## Prior art

<!-- Links to similar features in other apps (Obsidian, Logseq, Mem0,
etc.) are very helpful. -->
